fields.label: Medical payments coverage is not available
Entry date into uninterrupted claims-made coverage
Has any product, work, accident, or location been excluded, uninsured, or self-insured from previous coverage?
Was tail coverage purchased under any previous policy?
Explanation: tail coverage purchased under previous policy
Does applicant draw plans, designs, or specifications for others?
Do any operations include blasting or utilize/store explosive material?
Do any operations include excavation, tunneling, underground work, or earth moving?
Do subcontractors carry coverages or limits less than yours?
Are subcontractors allowed to work without providing certificates of insurance?
Does applicant lease equipment to others with or without operators?
Does applicant install, service, or demonstrate products?
Foreign products sold, distributed, or used as components?
Research and development conducted or new products planned?
Guarantees, warranties, or hold harmless agreements?
Products related to aircraft or space industry?
Products of others sold or repackaged under applicant label?
Explanation: products of others under applicant label
Explanation: products under label of others
Does any named insured sell to other named insureds?
Explanation: named insured sells to other named insureds
Any medical facilities provided or medical professionals employed/contracted?
Any exposure to radioactive or nuclear materials?
Do operations involve storing, treating, discharging, applying, disposing, or transporting hazardous materials?
Any operations sold, acquired, or discontinued in the last five years?
Do you rent or loan equipment to others?
Any watercraft, docks, or floats owned, hired, or leased?
Any parking facilities owned or rented?
Is a fee charged for parking?
Is there a swimming pool on premises?
Has applicant been active in or currently active in joint ventures?
Do you lease employees to or from other employers?
Is there a labor interchange with any other business or subsidiary?
Are day care facilities operated or controlled?
Have any crimes occurred or been attempted on your premises within the last three years?
Is there a formal, written safety and security policy in effect?
Does promotional literature make representations about safety or security of the premises?
